rationale: The cited article is used for a specific mechanism claim, not just a background list citation: the citing paper explicitly relies on Pocheptsova et al. (2009) to argue that cognitive resource depletion impairs deliberative processing and increases reliance on affective/intuitive processing. This mechanism is central to the citing paper's proposed process chain linking identity incongruence to lower price sensitivity. The citing paper also states that its Study 4 depletion manipulation (Stroop task) is adapted from Pocheptsova et al. (2009), indicating concrete methodological borrowing.
relation_description: The citing paper treats Pocheptsova et al. (2009) as theoretical and methodological grounding for its process account. It uses that prior work to justify the depletion-to-processing shift and adapts its depletion manipulation to test a boundary condition in the new identity-price-sensitivity context.
